message:
fix(cli): fix two bugs in config validation (ntm-3roo)

1. FixableCount was counting from Errors instead of Warnings
   - Fixable flag is only set on Warnings, so count was always 0

2. Agent executable check now skips env var assignments
   - Commands like "NODE_OPTIONS=... claude" now correctly
     identify "claude" as the executable, not the env var

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
